items.name: Turtle's Paradise Flyer #1
items.location: Sector 5 slums — kid's house, upstairs
items.notes: First of six flyers. Widely listed as missable once you leave Midgar (some guides say the Disc 2 raid offers a second chance — verify).

items.name: Enemy Skill Materia #1
items.location: Shinra HQ — Fl.67 specimen lab
items.notes: First of four Enemy Skill materia in the game. Gone once you leave the tower.

items.name: Elemental Materia
items.location: Shinra HQ — Fl.62, Mayor Domino's password
items.notes: Guess the password (or bribe the deputy) before leaving the tower.

items.name: Aerith — Limit Lv.2 & 3
items.location: Earned in battle with Aerith in the party
items.notes: Hard deadline — she leaves the party after the Temple of the Ancients.

items.name: Mythril
items.location: Sleeping Man's cave near Junon (Buggy required)
items.notes: Battle-count trick; trade it at the Weapon Seller's house for Great Gospel.

route.why: Grab it as soon as the Buggy can reach the cave

items.name: Great Gospel (Aerith Lv.4)
items.location: Weapon Seller's house near Gongaga
items.notes: Aerith's final Limit Break. Same deadline as her other limits.

route.why: Trade the Mythril before the Temple — it is gone after

items.name: Fort Condor — early skirmish reward
items.location: Fort Condor
items.notes: Battles expire as the story advances (window approximate).

route.why: Cheap reward now; the battle expires quietly

items.name: Recruit Yuffie
items.location: Random encounter in any forest
items.notes: Skippable but never missable. Answer her questions carefully.

items.name: Recruit Vincent
items.location: Shinra Mansion safe — Nibelheim
items.notes: Crack the safe, beat Lost Number, talk to him in the basement.

items.name: Odin Materia
items.location: Shinra Mansion safe — Nibelheim
items.notes: Drops from Lost Number, the safe boss.

items.name: Beta (Enemy Skill)
items.location: Grasslands marshes — Midgar Zolom
items.notes: Brutal fight this early; one of the best pickups in the game.

route.why: Painful now, pays off for two discs

items.name: Titan Materia
items.location: Gongaga — ruined reactor
items.notes: Sitting in the open by the reactor.

items.name: Wutai — Pagoda of the Five Gods
items.location: Wutai
items.notes: Yuffie's personal questline; rewards Leviathan and All Creation (her Lv.4 limit).

items.name: Bahamut Materia
items.location: Temple of the Ancients — Red Dragon fight
items.notes: The temple collapses after the story sequence — pick it up during the visit.

items.name: Alexander Materia
items.location: Great Glacier — touch the hot springs, then beat the Snow woman
items.notes: Awkward to return to the glacier later — treat it as a one-shot window.

items.name: Neo Bahamut Materia
items.location: Whirlwind Maze — on the path
items.notes: Lying on the ground inside the maze; no return trip.

items.name: The Highwind
items.location: Story — Junon escape
items.notes: Free flight. The endgame opens up here.

route.why: Everything below assumes free flight

items.name: Chocobo Lure Materia
items.location: Chocobo Farm shop
items.notes: Buy at least one; equip it to encounter chocobos at tracks.

route.why: No lure, no chocobos — buy it on the way in

items.name: Rent 6 Chocobo Stables
items.location: Chocobo Farm — talk to Choco Billy
items.notes: 10,000 gil each. You need room for parents, babies, and the gold.

route.why: Breeding needs the stable space up front

items.name: 3 Carob Nuts
items.location: Steal from Vlakorados near Bone Village
items.notes: One per colored breeding step. The Gold Saucer sells one for 500 GP as a fallback.

route.why: Each colored chick costs a nut — stock up once

items.name: Good Chocobo (female)
items.location: Tracks near the Gold Saucer
items.notes: Catch with a Wonderful/Good rating per Choco Billy.

route.why: First parent of the blue/green pair

items.name: Great Chocobo (male)
items.location: Tracks near Mideel
items.notes: Second parent. Feed both plenty of greens before racing.

route.why: Second parent of the blue/green pair

items.name: Race the pair to Class B
items.location: Gold Saucer — Chocobo Square
items.notes: Higher-class parents dramatically improve breeding odds.

route.why: Class B parents before the first Carob breed

items.name: Blue (River) Chocobo
items.location: Breed Good × Great with a Carob Nut
items.notes: Save before breeding; reload until the color lands.

route.why: Half of the black chocobo pair

items.name: Green (Mountain) Chocobo
items.location: Breed Good × Great with a Carob Nut
items.notes: Needs opposite sex to the blue — reload until you get the pair.

route.why: Other half of the black chocobo pair

items.name: Race blue & green to Class A
items.location: Gold Saucer — Chocobo Square
items.notes: Both colored birds should hit Class A before the next breed.

route.why: Class A colors before breeding the black

items.name: Black Chocobo
items.location: Breed Blue × Green with a Carob Nut
items.notes: Can cross rivers and mountains — and is half of the gold pair.

route.why: Parent of the gold

items.name: Race the black to Class S
items.location: Gold Saucer — Chocobo Square
items.notes: A Class S black plus a Wonderful partner all but guarantees the gold.

route.why: Stack the odds before the final breed

items.name: Zeio Nut
items.location: Steal from Goblin — Goblin Island (northeast sea)
items.notes: The gold breed needs this specific nut.

route.why: The gold breed consumes exactly one

items.name: Gold Chocobo
items.location: Breed Black × Wonderful with the Zeio Nut
items.notes: Crosses everything. The key to Round Island.

route.why: The only way to reach Round Island

items.name: Knights of the Round
items.location: Round Island — northeast corner of the map
items.notes: The strongest summon in the game. Master it for a second via Bugenhagen? Later problem.

route.why: The whole point of the gold bird

items.name: W-Summon Materia
items.location: Gold Saucer — Battle Square, 64,000 BP
items.notes: Expensive but doubles KotR casts against the superbosses.

route.why: Pairs with KotR for the Weapon fights

items.name: HP Absorb Materia
items.location: Northern Crater — early descent
items.notes: Link with KotR: thirteen hits of healing per cast.

route.why: KotR + HP Absorb is the superboss sustain loop

items.name: Emerald Weapon
items.location: Ocean floor — requires the submarine
items.notes: Underwater materia removes the 20-minute timer. Bring KotR + W-Summon + HP Absorb. Drops the Earth Harp.

route.why: The loadout is ready — go hunting

items.name: Ruby Weapon
items.location: Desert around the Gold Saucer
items.notes: Appears after the Weapons stir. Knock out two allies before it surfaces its tentacles. Drops the Desert Rose.

route.why: Last checkmark before the finale

items.name: Turtle's Paradise Flyer #2
items.location: Fort Condor — 1st floor, by the entrance
items.notes: Read the poster on the wall.

items.name: Turtle's Paradise Flyer #3
items.location: Gold Saucer — Ghost Hotel lobby
items.notes: Poster by the item shop counter.

items.name: Turtle's Paradise Flyer #4
items.location: Cosmo Canyon — Tiger Lily Arms Shop
items.notes: On the wall inside the weapon shop.

items.name: Turtle's Paradise Flyer #5
items.location: Cosmo Canyon — Shildra Inn
items.notes: On the wall inside the inn.

items.name: Turtle's Paradise Flyer #6
items.location: Wutai — Turtle's Paradise bar
items.notes: The bar running the contest has the last flyer.

items.name: Turtle's Paradise prize
items.location: Wutai — Turtle's Paradise owner
items.notes: Power Source, Guard Source, Magic Source, Mind Source, Speed Source, Luck Source, Megalixir — if you read all six flyers.

items.name: Enemy Skill Materia #2
items.location: Junon — house next to the respectable inn
items.notes: On the floor; easy to walk past during the parade chaos.

items.name: Enemy Skill Materia #3
items.location: Forgotten City — inside the house with the bed
items.notes: Grab it on the way through.

items.name: Enemy Skill Materia #4
items.location: Chocobo Sage's house — talk to the green chocobo
items.notes: Requires the Highwind to reach the Sage.

items.name: Trine (Enemy Skill)
items.location: Materia Keeper (Mt. Nibel), Godo (Wutai pagoda), or Stilva (Gaea's Cliff)
items.notes: Only three casters in the game — Gaea's Cliff is the last chance. Learn it on every Enemy Skill materia you care about.

route.why: Three sources total; do not leave Mt. Nibel without it

items.name: Pandora's Box (Enemy Skill)
items.location: Northern Crater — Dragon Zombie
items.notes: Cast exactly once per save — by the first Dragon Zombie that dies. Have every Enemy Skill materia equipped for it.

route.why: One cast per save file, ever

items.name: Chocobuckle (Enemy Skill)
items.location: Any chocobo — feed Mimett Greens, cast L4 Suicide
items.notes: Fiddly setup; needs a level-16 chocobo for the classic version.

items.name: Ultima Weapon (Cloud)
items.location: Defeat Ultimate Weapon — final battle near Cosmo Canyon
items.notes: Chase it around the world with the Highwind; it drops Cloud's ultimate sword.

route.why: Unlocks Ancient Forest too — two birds

items.name: Missing Score (Barret)
items.location: Midgar raid — stairs to the Proud Clod fight, ONLY with Barret in party
items.notes: The most missable ultimate weapon in the game. One screen, one chance, Barret required.

route.why: One screen, one chance — bring Barret

items.name: Premium Heart (Tifa)
items.location: Wall Market — the broken computer shop 'Item Shop'
items.notes: Grab during the raid, or return later with the Key to Sector 5.

items.name: Princess Guard (Aerith)
items.location: Temple of the Ancients — clock room, hand IV
items.notes: Her ultimate weapon, in the temple that collapses. Poignant and easy to skip.

items.name: Venus Gospel (Cid)
items.location: Rocket Town — old man outside the item shop, talk three times
items.notes: Available after the rocket launches.

items.name: Conformer (Yuffie)
items.location: Sunken Gelnika — cargo hold
items.notes: Arguably the best ultimate weapon — no drawback, scales with enemy level.

items.name: Limited Moon (Red XIII)
items.location: Cosmo Canyon — Bugenhagen, late Disc 2
items.notes: Visit Bugenhagen with Red XIII after the Midgar raid.

items.name: Death Penalty + Chaos (Vincent)
items.location: Lucrecia's Cave — waterfall lake (submarine or gold chocobo)
items.notes: Visit with Vincent, leave, fight ~10 battles, return. Weapon and final limit together.

route.why: The sub is new — Lucrecia's cave is now reachable

items.name: Omnislash (Cloud Lv.4)
items.location: Gold Saucer — Battle Square, 51,200 BP (32,000 during Disc 3)
items.notes: Grind Battle Points with a strong solo Cloud setup.

route.why: BP grind while the breeding chain simmers

items.name: Catastrophe (Barret Lv.4)
items.location: North Corel — woman in the inn-side house, after the Huge Materia train
items.notes: Talk to the woman whose house you saved (or didn't — verify whether failing the train forfeits it).

items.name: Final Heaven (Tifa Lv.4)
items.location: Nibelheim — Tifa's piano, with Tifa leading the party
items.notes: Play the piano tune from the flashback. Requires Cloud's return from the Lifestream.

items.name: Cosmo Memory (Red XIII Lv.4)
items.location: Shinra Mansion — Lost Number (the safe boss)
items.notes: Same fight that unlocks Vincent and Odin.

items.name: Highwind (Cid Lv.4)
items.location: Sunken Gelnika — cargo hold
items.notes: In the same wreck as the Conformer.

items.name: Ramuh Materia
items.location: Gold Saucer — Chocobo Square jockey lounge
items.notes: On the floor of the jockeys' waiting room.

items.name: Choco/Mog Materia
items.location: Chocobo Farm — talk to the chocobos and say 'Wark'
items.notes: Free summon for being polite to birds.

items.name: Kujata Materia
items.location: Sleeping Forest — floating red materia, grab it as it drifts
items.notes: Easy to walk straight past on the way to the Forgotten City.

items.name: Typhon Materia + Ancient Forest
items.location: Ancient Forest — puzzle grove near Cosmo Canyon
items.notes: Forest opens after Ultimate Weapon falls (or early with a gold chocobo). Also holds Apocalypse and Elixirs.

route.why: Opens the moment Ultimate Weapon dies

items.name: Hades Materia
items.location: Sunken Gelnika — research room
items.notes: The best status-stack summon in the game.

items.name: Phoenix Materia
items.location: Fort Condor — win the final (Huge Materia) battle
items.notes: Tied to the Fort Condor Huge Materia assault. Verify whether losing the minigame still awards it.

items.name: Bahamut ZERO Materia
items.location: Cosmo Canyon — blue Huge Materia at the observatory
items.notes: Examine the blue Huge Materia while carrying Bahamut and Neo Bahamut.

route.why: Needs the rocket's Huge Materia plus both Bahamuts

items.name: Huge Materia — Corel train
items.location: North Corel — stop the runaway train
items.notes: Fail the minigame and the materia (and part of Corel) is gone for good.

route.why: Timed minigame — one attempt

items.name: Huge Materia — Fort Condor
items.location: Fort Condor — final battle
items.notes: The condor's last stand. Phoenix comes with victory.

route.why: The condor egg hatches with or without you

items.name: Huge Materia — Underwater Reactor
items.location: Junon — submarine chase
items.notes: If the red sub escapes, the materia lands in the Sunken Gelnika — recoverable, but log it honestly.

route.why: Win the sub chase and keep the set intact

items.name: Huge Materia — Rocket
items.location: Rocket Town — launch sequence, Cid's code (Circle, Square, X, X)
items.notes: Miss the code and Bahamut ZERO is gone with it.

route.why: Bahamut ZERO depends on this one

items.name: W-Item Materia
items.location: Midgar raid — winding tunnel, off the main path
items.notes: Grab it during the raid. Some guides say the Key to Sector 5 offers a second chance — verify.

route.why: In the raid tunnels you are already walking

items.name: W-Magic Materia
items.location: Northern Crater — descent, left path
items.notes: Deep in the crater on the way down.

items.name: Mime Materia
items.location: Materia cave south of Wutai
items.notes: Needs a river-capable chocobo (blue or better) or the gold. Mime + KotR is the classic loop.

route.why: First stop once any colored bird can cross water

items.name: Quadra Magic Materia
items.location: Materia cave northeast of Mideel
items.notes: Mountain/river chocobo required.

items.name: HP↔MP Materia
items.location: Materia cave north of Corel
items.notes: Green or better chocobo required. Niche, but it's a collectible cave.

items.name: Full Cure Materia
items.location: Cosmo Canyon — materia shop, second visit
items.notes: Talk to the shopkeeper upstairs after getting the Highwind.

items.name: Contain Materia
items.location: Mideel — feed the white chocobo Samolen greens, scratch behind its ears
items.notes: Commonly listed as still available in ruined Mideel — window set pessimistically until verified.

items.name: Guide Book
items.location: Morph the Ghost Ship — Underwater Reactor tunnel
items.notes: Trade to the Kalm Traveler for the Underwater materia.

route.why: Morph one Ghost Ship while you are down here

items.name: Underwater Materia
items.location: Kalm — traveler, in exchange for the Guide Book
items.notes: Removes Emerald Weapon's 20-minute timer.

route.why: Turns Emerald from a race into a fight

items.name: Master Materia set (Earth Harp trade)
items.location: Kalm — traveler, in exchange for Emerald Weapon's Earth Harp
items.notes: Master Magic, Master Command, Master Summon in one trade.

items.name: Final Attack Materia
items.location: Gold Saucer — Battle Square special battle
items.notes: Special battle unlocks after earning Omnislash and W-Summon. Final Attack + Phoenix = practical immortality.

route.why: Pair with Phoenix before the superbosses

items.name: Double Cut Materia
items.location: Sunken Gelnika — cargo hold
items.notes: 2x-Cut/4x-Cut. The Gelnika sweep also holds Outsider, Spirit Lance, Heaven's Cloud, and Megalixirs.

items.name: Key to Sector 5
items.location: Bone Village — dig near the tent (normal treasure hunt)
items.notes: Reopens Midgar after the raid — mop up whatever you missed there.

items.name: Villa Cloud
items.location: Costa del Sol — buy the villa (300,000 gil)
items.notes: Pure flavor. You become a property owner and the game congratulates you.

items.name: Curse Ring
items.location: Mideel — locked door, 'pull out and examine' the odd key
items.notes: Fiddly key sequence in town; pessimistic window until the ruined-Mideel behavior is verified.
